note: ARENA_PACKAGE_ID is the submission Package ID. This is the post-audit deployment: settle is constrained to seated owners, join requires owner+registration, buy_intel binds a registered target's real owner/mandate, and reclaim adds a timeout escape. Treasury is a shared object; upgrade and buy_intel take it by reference and route fees to treasuryAddress. The Avow package (0x4f3e...a3ee) is reused unchanged, not redeployed.

supersedes.reason: Pre-audit deployment, abandoned. Had an unconstrained settle winner (High), no PLAYING-state escape, and no owner/consent gate on join. No real funds were ever escrowed.
